\tzpentry{ID4797}{Text Wess-Zumino-Witten Action Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4797 introduces Text Wess-Zumino-Witten Action Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\mathcal{S}_{\\text{WZW}} = \\frac{k}{8\\pi} \\int_{\\mathcal{M}} \\text{Tr}(g^{-1} dg)^3\n\\end{equation}
